file_insights.pattern_consistency: follows existing diagnostic section format (header, status check, output)

patterns_discovered.name: doctor_diagnostic_section_pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Consistent structure: section header comment, println header, conditional check, output with status prefix (ok/info/missing)
patterns_discovered.evidence: All doctor sections (zellij plugin, zellij session) follow this format
patterns_discovered.value: enables rapid addition of new diagnostic checks

patterns_discovered.name: environment_variable_based_detection
patterns_discovered.description: Using std::env::var() with Result pattern matching for runtime context detection
patterns_discovered.value: non-invasive way to detect execution context

patterns_discovered.name: non_blocking_diagnostic_level
patterns_discovered.description: Informational diagnostics use 'info' level rather than failure, allowing bop to function without Zellij
patterns_discovered.value: graceful degradation; local testing doesn't require Zellij

gotchas_discovered.impact: Will not validate that the session is the expected 'pmr' session (only that some session exists)
gotchas_discovered.context: Memory notes that dispatch.nu expects Zellij session name 'pmr'

gotchas_discovered.issue: No validation of Zellij version or capability
gotchas_discovered.impact: Env var check succeeds but doesn't verify Zellij features needed by bop
gotchas_discovered.context: Plugin registration and pane management require specific Zellij features

approach_outcome.scope: focused, single-file change with surgical precision
approach_outcome.risk_level: minimal - purely additive diagnostic, no logic changes to core dispatcher

recommendations.suggestion: Extend session check to validate session name matches 'pmr' if running dispatch.nu
recommendations.rationale: dispatch.nu hardcodes 'pmr' as Zellij session name; doctor could warn if wrong session

recommendations.suggestion: Consider checking ZELLIJ env var directly as backup
recommendations.rationale: ZELLIJ_SESSION_NAME may not be set in all Zellij contexts; ZELLIJ is more reliable

recommendations.suggestion: Document in doctor output that bop can run outside Zellij (local testing)
recommendations.rationale: Message 'not running in Zellij' is informational but could confuse users about requirements
